finding.title: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal Vulnerability (CVE-2021-41773)
finding.remediation_summary: Immediately patch Apache HTTP Server to version 2.4.51 or later to mitigate CVE-2021-41773. Review web server access controls and restrict access to /.htacess and similar configuration files, considering disabling 'require all granted' directives.

finding.title: Outdated Apache Web Server (2.4.50) Exposed on Port 80
finding.remediation_summary: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to the latest stable version to address general security improvements and potential unlisted vulnerabilities. Review network segmentation to ensure the web server is appropriately isolated (e.g., within a DMZ) and apply comprehensive hardening guidelines for the web server and its underlying operating system.

finding.title: Missing Security Headers & Reflected XSS
finding.remediation_summary: The file reports/asasedu_webapp_config.py has multiple critical issues: (1) Reflected XSS in /user/<username> route - no input sanitization. (2) DEBUG=True in production. (3) Hardcoded SECRET_KEY. Fix: Add input escaping via markupsafe.escape(), set DEBUG=False, load SECRET_KEY from environment variable os.environ.get('SECRET_KEY').
